phases.name: Design system & landing page
phases.detail: Token-driven components, WCAG-graded palette, SVG iconography shipped in v2.0.0.

phases.name: Planning & process docs
phases.detail: Project plans, the branching and release process, and this status page.

phases.name: Daily OSINT data pipeline
phases.detail: Scheduled Overpass and Oakland open data pulls into SQLite/JSON, with an Auto-listed badge for pipeline-sourced locations.

phases.name: Community submissions
phases.detail: Suggest-a-place submissions via GitHub Issue Forms, ingested hourly by an automated workflow.

phases.name: Email confirmations
phases.detail: Resend confirmations and opt-in updates, sent by a GitHub Action using repository secrets.

phases.name: Data hygiene & attribution
phases.detail: Staleness and liveness automation, ODbL attribution, and privacy documentation updates.
